scenarios.name: Earthquake Debris
scenarios.description: Dense rubble clusters blocking search-and-rescue routes. D* Lite navigates dynamic debris field in real-time.

scenarios.name: Flood Rescue
scenarios.description: Rising flood channels severing escape corridors. Drone adapts path as water levels rise.

scenarios.name: Border Patrol
scenarios.description: Sparse but dynamic threat insertions. High-speed D* Lite response ensures zero coverage gaps.
